mapper.select: SELECT vs.*, s.skill_name, s.skill_code, s.category, s.icon FROM volunteer_skill vs LEFT JOIN skill s ON vs.skill_id = s.id WHERE vs.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.category, s.sort_order
SELECT vs.*, s.skill_name, s.skill_code, s.category, s.icon FROM volunteer_skill vs LEFT JOIN skill s ON vs.skill_id = s.id WHERE vs.skill_id = #{skillId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO volunteer_skill (user_id, skill_id, proficiency_level, years_experience, certification) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skillId}, #{proficiencyLevel}, #{yearsExperience}, #{certification})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM volunteer_skill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND skill_id = #{skillId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO volunteer_skill (user_id, skill_id, proficiency_level, years_experience) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.skillId}, #{item.proficiencyLevel}, #{item.yearsExperience})
